DEPT. 7, JUDGE THOMAS KELLY, CSR BELDON YEE, CLERK EMONTI C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. TURNER BRASHEAR FOR PLTF. NICOLAUS HARKINS FOR DEFT. COURT REPORTER WAIVED FOR JURY VOIR DIRE PER STIP. ROLL CALL. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
